refined_caption: The hospital floor has visible water stains and a toilet is present in the background. There is a water puddle on the floor.
complaint_description: I was visiting a patient on the general ward and noticed a water puddle on the floor, which could be a slipping hazard. The floor also has water stains, indicating a possible leak. This is a concern for patient safety and hygiene.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor on the general ward, it's really slippery and there are stains everywhere.
